script_text: Fact books often connect things to each other.
Two events. Two steps. Two ideas.
Let us learn how to spot the connections!
Sequence means the order things happen.
First this. Then that. Last another thing.
Look for words like first, next, and finally.
First, a butterfly lays an egg.
Finally, a butterfly comes out! Each step connects to the next.
Spot words like first, next, then, last. They mark the order!
Now you are ready to connect history and science!
